title: US bombs targets in Iran and Tehran declares Strait of Hormuz closed
summary: The military escalation between the US and Iran causes the disappearance of an Indian citizen and international concern over oil supply.

title: ASEAN resumes dialogue with Myanmar by allowing its foreign minister to attend for the first time in five years
summary: The decision marks a change in the strategy of pressure on the Myanmar military junta after the 2021 coup.

title: Republican Senator Phil Gramm dies at 71 from a sudden illness
summary: The politician, a key ally of Donald Trump, was one of the most influential voices of the party in Congress.

title: Yokozuna Oonosato suffers a surprising defeat on the first day of the Nagoya sumo tournament
summary: The wrestler recently returned from an injury could not overpower his rival, on a day that also saw the victory of Hoshoryu.

title: The national teams of France, Spain, England, and Argentina qualify for the World Cup semifinals
summary: Argentina and England advance after defeating Switzerland and Norway respectively in extra time, while Bellingham stands out with two goals.

title: Shikoku region declares the rainy season over and temperatures up to 38 degrees expected in western Japan
summary: Extreme heat continues in wide areas of the country, with a heatstroke alert for July 13.

title: Oden Takahashi wins his second consecutive title at Wimbledon in wheelchair tennis
summary: The Japanese tennis player also achieves his sixth consecutive victory in Grand Slam tournaments in the category.

title: Thirty years since the E. coli O157 outbreak in Sakai that affected more than 9,000 people
summary: Authorities and relatives pay tribute to the four fatalities of Japan's largest food poisoning case.

title: Jockey Yutaka Take reaches 5,000 career wins, a historic milestone in Japanese horse racing
summary: Take, with a 40-year career, says he will continue breaking records after achieving the feat.

title: The Akita Shinkansen service between Morioka and Akita suspended all day due to torrential rain
summary: Operations will resume on the morning of July 13 if conditions permit.

title: A woman in her 20s goes missing after a jet ski capsizes off the coast of Chiba
summary: Rescue services are searching for the young woman, who was traveling with two other people who were unharmed.

title: Father of high school student who died inside a gym mat continues the fight 33 years later
summary: The three former students responsible for the homicide have not responded to the compensation lawsuit.

title: 33-year-old man arrested for hitting a 22-year-old nurse with a hammer in Sapporo
summary: The suspect, who turned himself in to police, is charged with murder after the fatal attack on the victim's head.

title: The 'Hikizome' of the Gion Festival in Kyoto begins, with the floats ready for the parade
summary: The different streets compete in handkerchief designs with traditional and modern motifs for the occasion.

title: Former Emir of Qatar Hamad bin Khalifa Al Thani dies at 74, driver of the country's modernization
summary: Under his rule, Qatar became a major exporter of liquefied natural gas and experienced political openness.

title: Nippon Steel Kashima team achieves an emotional victory in the Kita-Kanto region urban baseball tournament
summary: The star pitcher fulfills his promise to give his best, while the former captain is remembered for his decisive play.

title: 100 days to go for the Asian Para Games in Aichi, with the presentation of the medals
summary: The governor of Aichi highlights the goal of showing a truly inclusive society during the event.

title: China criticizes Japanese Foreign Minister for his statements on the South China Sea
summary: The Philippines, together with Japan, the United States, and Australia, issue a joint statement against unilateral actions in the region.

title: Veterans of the Liberal Democratic Party express concern over imperial succession
summary: Internal discussions in the ruling party reflect the complexity of ensuring the stability of the line of succession.

title: Allegations of money exchange in the Fukuoka prefectural assembly pit witnesses and LDP leaders against each other
summary: Four witnesses claim to have witnessed illicit payments, while the accused deny it outright and an investigation of all deputies is being prepared.
